## Tags
time, timer, stopwatch

## Categories
time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/timer-reset)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TimerReset;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TimerReset { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
